gates.name: rz
gates.qasm_def: gate rz(theta) q { U(0, 0, theta) q; }

gates.name: sx
gates.qasm_def: gate sx q { U(pi/2, 3*pi/2, pi/2) q; }

gates.name: x
gates.qasm_def: gate x q { U(pi, 0, pi) q; }

gates.name: cz
gates.qasm_def: gate cz q0, q1 { CZ q0, q1; }

instruction_signatures.description: A shorter width measurement pulse, intended for use in mid-circuit readout.
instruction_signatures.name: measure_2
